data.name: You Are Horny - Episode 1
data.detailed_description:
You Are Horny is exactly what it sounds like—a wild, short, ridiculous, and totally unserious adult visual novel where the plot exists just enough to get you from one spicy scene to the next. It’s got stepfamily drama, over-the-top situations, and a cast of ridiculously attractive characters who all seem to have one thing in common: they really can’t keep their hands to themselves.

There’s no deep lore, no complex branching storylines—just pure, unfiltered fun with a little bit of heart. Whether you’re here for the laughs, the absurd setups, or just the good stuff, You Are Horny delivers exactly what it promises. So sit back, enjoy the ride, and remember: don’t think too hard—just be horny.

data.short_description: A short totally unserious adult visual novel packed with stepfamily drama, absurd situations, and nonstop spicy fun. No deep plot—just good times, wild encounters, and plenty of action. Don’t think too hard—just be horny!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 540 MB 可用空間
